title: Building excellence in Ethiopian coffee and global trade.
intro: Hayked General Trading PLC is an Ethiopian-owned company positioned around coffee processing, warehousing, export coordination and long-term business relationships.
storyTitle: A practical partner across the coffee value chain.
storyText: The company’s public positioning emphasizes Ethiopian Arabica coffee, processing, warehousing and export solutions. Hayked aims to build long-term relationships through professional preparation and clear buyer communication.
mission: Deliver professionally prepared Ethiopian coffee and dependable trading support to global buyers.
vision: Become a trusted and innovative African company in coffee processing, warehousing, exporting and diversified trade.
leadershipText: Hayked’s leadership brings together experience in coffee trading, business development and long-term commercial relationships.
